top_signals.title: Fintech firm Mercury hits $5.2 billion valuation after funding round, up 49% in 14 months
top_signals.summary: Mercury has emerged as one of a select group of fintech firms, like Ramp and Stripe, that continued to thrive after the collapse of pandemic-era valuations.

top_signals.title: DR Congo: Fears Fifa World Cup could be Ebola superspreader event
top_signals.summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo’s participation in the Fifa World Cup is under threat after an Ebola outbreak led to a US travel ban on the African nation. Health reports suggest there are over 500 suspected cases of the contagious disease in the DRC, with over 125 deaths. It is not yet being classed as [...]
